title: TypeError when creating a product
description: ProductService.create_product raises TypeError: can only concatenate str (not UUID) to str. Blocks all product creation flows.

title: Stock not updated when setting value to zero
description: Calling update_product with stock=0 silently keeps the previous stock value. Falsy check treats 0 as no update.

title: Order can be cancelled multiple times
description: cancel_order has no status guard. Calling it on an already-cancelled order restores stock again, inflating inventory.

title: Order total truncates decimal prices
description: calculate_total returns an integer. Prices like 9.99 x 2 = 19.98 are returned as 19. Financial calculations are wrong.

title: Password comparison is case-insensitive
description: authenticate() lowercases both passwords before comparing. 'Secret' and 'secret' are treated as the same password. Security vulnerability.

title: Duplicate email allowed on registration
description: register() only checks username uniqueness. Two different accounts can share the same email address.

title: No validation on product price at creation
description: create_product accepts negative unit_price without raising an error. A product can be created with price=-50.

title: Order references non-existent product without clear error
description: If a product_id in order items does not exist, the error from get_product_stock propagates without context about which order caused it.

title: UserService has no get_all_users method
description: No way to list all registered users. Requested by admin panel team. Deferred to next sprint.

title: search_products returns Product objects not dicts
description: API layer expected dicts but got Product objects. Fixed at the API layer — not a bug in ProductService itself.
